title: First portfolio
description: Project where I got a basic understanding of responsive design with the previously known HTML and CSS skills.

title: Pine keyboards
description: For this project the design was mostly done with bootstrap framework, with little to no modification from other css files.

title: JavaScript
description: My introduction to JavaScript, that got implemented in my future projects

title: Music House Daily
description: First project with JavaScript, printing data with filtering, using regexes and variable states.

title: Music Stop
description: Using jquery library and first time using ajax callbacks and localstorage, mock up of a guitar shop.

title: PHP
description: After learning and using some of the client technologies, it was time to learn how to hande data from other sources.

title: Dotblog
description: Social network using basic php with previously aquired knowledge of client side technologies.

title: Vinylboy
description: In this project the structure of php page consisted of only loading models from index page, emulating modern frameworks.

title: Full Stack Web Apps
description: With many skills and wast knowledge aquired, I have gone into making scalable and stable web apps for client purposes, this point marks the start of my client demand based journey.

title: Level Supplements
description: My most complex project to this day, a web shop for supplementation that includes the cart, ordering, cascading categories, dedicated admin panel with insights, all done in Angular, C# .NET 8 ASP, with database in MSSQL all hosted on Azure as a Web App.

title: What is next?
description: There are more projects that are not hosted at the moment, from those done in Angular, Laravel and other technologies as ASP.NET that you can see on my github page by clicking here. Of course, this timeline will only grow.
